text.title: C# / ASP.NET Core Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply C# / ASP.NET Core end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: scaffold-layers
step.action: Create controller → service → repository layering; register services via DI; DbContext as scoped (r2).

step.name: wire-async-ct-everywhere
step.action: Every async method takes CancellationToken (r3); pass it to EF Core calls.

step.name: install-problem-details-handler
step.action: Register a global IExceptionHandler that maps domain exceptions to ProblemDetails (r4); never leak stack traces to clients.

step.name: adopt-record-dtos-and-mappers
step.action: DTOs as record types with init properties (r5); mappers via AutoMapper/Mapperly; never return tracked EF entities.

step.name: wire-testcontainers-and-keyset-pagination
step.action: WebApplicationFactory + Testcontainers Postgres (r7); keyset pagination for list endpoints (r8); eager .Include() everywhere (r9); explicit transactions for multi-step writes (r10).

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
